meaning: v.记入贷方,信用 vbl.记入贷方,信用
examples: The invention of the industrial robot is credited to the company.
Madame Clicquot is credited with the perfection of this technique.
I credited you with a little more sense.
Gates credited Jobs with creating a computer that could be an empowering phenomenon.
Leggett is credited with formulating "a decisive theory" to explain how their atoms are ordered.
